id: "19.3.4"
title: "Azure Arc for Servers Heartbeat Health and Extension Inventory Drift"
criticality: "high"
splunkPillar: "Observability"
---

# UC-19.3.4 · Azure Arc for Servers Heartbeat Health and Extension Inventory Drift

## Description

Detects **Azure Arc-enabled Servers** hybrid-control-plane drift where **`Connected`** **`Machine`** **`Agent`** **`heartbeat`** **`PUT`** traffic toward **`*.his.arc.azure.com`** stalls (**`Disconnected`**, **`Expired`**, **`Error`** **`microsoft.hybridcompute/machines`** **`properties.status`** rows misaligned with **`properties.lastStatusChange`** signals), where **`properties.provisioningState`** leaves **`Succeeded`**, **`Failed`**, **`Creating`**, **`Deleting`**, **`Updating`** handlers outside automation intent, and where **`microsoft.azure.monitor.AzureMonitorWindowsAgent`**/**`AzureMonitorLinuxAgent`**, **`microsoft.enterprisecloud.monitoring.MicrosoftMonitoringAgent`**, **`microsoft.guestconfiguration.GuestConfiguration`**, **`microsoft.azure.security.AzureSecurityCenter`**, **`microsoft.azure.management.DependencyAgentWindows`**, **`microsoft.azure.compute.AdminCenter`**, **`microsoft.azure.update.WindowsAdminCenter`**, **`microsoft.azure.security.AntimalwareForPaaS`**, **`microsoft.compute.CustomScriptExtension`** inventories diverge from **`Azure`** **`CLI`** **`connectedmachine`** **`extension`** **`list`** **`baselines`** **`during`** **`multi-cloud`** **`coverage`** **`reviews`**.

## Value

**Splunk** correlates **`himds.log`** **`HTTPS`** **`transport`** **`facts`** **`with`** **`Resource`** **`Graph`** **`microsoft.hybridcompute/machines`** **`properties.status`** **`/`** **`properties.lastStatusChange`** **`snapshots`** **`so`** **`teams`** **`catch`** **`Disconnected`** **`Arc`** **`registration`** **`before`** **`guest`** **`telemetry`** **`still`** **`looks`** **`alive`** **`inside`** **`Log`** **`Analytics`** **`Heartbeat`** **`tables`** **`filtered`** **`to`** **`Microsoft.HybridCompute`**. **Extension** **`inventory`** **`tracks`** **`properties.provisioningState`** **`Failed`**/**`Updating`**/**`Creating`**/**`Deleting`** **`bursts`** **`alongside`** **`GuestConfiguration`**, **`AMA`**, **`MMA`**, **`AzureSecurityCenter`**, **`DependencyAgentWindows`**, **`AdminCenter`**, **`WindowsAdminCenter`**, **`AntimalwareForPaaS`**, **`CustomScriptExtension`** **`cohorts`** **`during`** **`hybrid`** **`coverage`** **`reviews`** **`—`** **`pair`** **`Splunk`** **`rows`** **`with`** **`CMDB`** **`coverage`** **`numerators`** **`every`** **`quarter`** **`so`** **`finance`** **`reviews`** **`stay`** **`honest`** **`about`** **`Arc`** **`attach`** **`rates`** **`versus`** **`guest`** **`telemetry`** **`noise`** **`alone`** **`during`** **`budget`** **`season`**.

## Implementation

Install **Splunk_TA_microsoft-cloudservices** Resource Graph collectors plus scripted **`HybridCompute`** **`machines/*/extensions`** REST pollers feeding **`azure:arc:extensions`**; forward **`himds.log`**/**`azcmagent.log`** as **`azure:arc:himds`**/**`azure:arc:azcmagent`**; normalize **`properties.lastStatusChange`** via ingest **`DATE`** **`macros`**; schedule **`spl`** **`savedsearches`** **`with`** **`lookup`** **`suppress_arc_noise`** **`fed`** **`by`** **`CMDB`** **`maintenance`** **`UTC`** **`tags`** **`plus`** **`migration_phase`** **`parallel_ingest`** **`flags`** **`before`** **`pager`** **`routing`** **`during`** **`planned`** **`freeze`** **`season`** **`once`** **`risk`** **`teams`** **`approve`** **`narrow`** **`exceptions`** **`inside`** **`ticket`** **`systems`**.

## Detailed Implementation

**Prerequisites**
• **Splunk Universal Forwarder** + **`Splunk_TA_windows`** (Splunkbase 742) maps `himds.log` / `azcmagent.log` into sourcetypes **`azure:arc:himds`** / **`azure:arc:azcmagent`** per **`servers/agent-overview`** on Microsoft Learn.
• **`Splunk_TA_microsoft-cloudservices`** (Splunkbase 3110) on a Heavy Forwarder POSTs **`management.azure.com/providers/Microsoft.ResourceGraph/resources`** (api-version **2024-04-01**) so **`mscs:resource:graph`** / **`azure:hybrid_compute_machines`** carries **`microsoft.hybridcompute/machines`** **`properties.status`** and **`properties.lastStatusChange`** aligned with **`GET`** **`management.azure.com/subscriptions/{sid}/providers/Microsoft.HybridCompute/machines`** (api-version **2024-07-10**).
• Automation + HEC publishes **`azure:arc:extensions`** from **`GET`** …**/HybridCompute/machines/{machine}/extensions** listing publishers **`microsoft.azure.monitor.AzureMonitorWindowsAgent`**, **`microsoft.azure.monitor.AzureMonitorLinuxAgent`**, **`microsoft.enterprisecloud.monitoring.MicrosoftMonitoringAgent`**, **`microsoft.guestconfiguration.GuestConfiguration`**, **`microsoft.azure.security.AzureSecurityCenter`**, **`microsoft.azure.security.AntimalwareForPaaS`**, **`microsoft.azure.management.DependencyAgentWindows`**, **`microsoft.azure.compute.AdminCenter`**, **`microsoft.azure.update.WindowsAdminCenter`**, **`microsoft.compute.CustomScriptExtension`** alongside **`properties.provisioningState`** (Succeeded / Failed / Creating / Deleting / Updating) and **`enableAutomaticUpgrade`** when ARM returns it.
• Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Azure (**3757**) optional **`mscs:azure:eventhub`** correlates **`Microsoft.HybridCompute`** Activity streams with **`himds`** HTTPS signatures.
• RBAC: **`authorize.conf`** grants **`azure_arc`**, **`azure_monitor`**, **`mscs_cloud`**, **`activity`** indexes—Azure automation secrets stay only inside **`storage/passwords`** references.
• Network: **`*.guestconfiguration.azure.com`**, **`*.his.arc.azure.com`**, **`*.servicebus.windows.net`**, **`login.microsoftonline.com`**, **`management.azure.com`** on TCP **443**—import corporate issuing CAs into guest OS trust bundles before TLS interception breaks Connected Machine Agent handshakes; pair **`himds`** events with openssl **`s_client`** captures during RCA; shard **`Azure Resource Graph`** queries per subscription when **`splunkd.log`** shows HTTP **429** during tenant-wide inventory runs.

Step 1 — **Configure ingestion paths**
(1) Windows monitor stanzas under **`%ProgramData%\AzureConnectedMachineAgent\Log\`** target **`himds.log`** / **`azcmagent.log`**; Linux peers use **`/var/opt/azcmagent/log/`**. Align **`host`** with **`microsoft.hybridcompute/machines`** name fields before CMDB joins.
(2) After each **`Splunk_TA_microsoft-cloudservices`** upgrade, run **`fieldsummary`** on **`mscs:resource:graph`** short windows—refresh **`FIELDALIAS`** / **`EVAL`** maps when dotted JSON keys drift.
(3) For **`azure:arc:extensions`**, enable **`spath`** / **`INDEXED_EXTRACTIONS`** so **`properties.provisioningState`** enums and **`instanceView.statuses[].code`** transitions (`ProvisioningState/succeeded` vs `ProvisioningState/failed`) remain searchable beside portal **`instanceView`** screenshots.
(4) Optional nightly summary indexing mirrors **`Azure Resource Graph`** JSON when auditors require immutable inventory diffs—scrub secrets / thumbprints / tokens before routing summaries.

Step 2 — **Author macros and saved searches**
Centralize **`coalesce()`** chains inside **`macros/arc_inventory_aliases`**; tag **`savedsearch`** **`arc_hybrid_inventory_posture`** with **`owner_team`**, **`subscription_id`**, **`review_cycle`** metadata; export macros beside Splunk packages in **`git`**; scrub vault pipelines before dashboard exports hit repositories; retain least-privilege Splunk indexes—SOC glass dashboards may mask presentation columns without relaxing index ACLs unless risk acceptance tickets document broader reader scopes.

```spl
(`index=azure_arc` OR `index=azure_monitor` OR `index=mscs_cloud` OR `index=activity`)
(`sourcetype="azure:hybrid_compute_machines"` OR `sourcetype="mscs:resource:graph"` OR `sourcetype="azure:arc:extensions"` OR `sourcetype="azure:arc:himds"` OR `sourcetype="azure:arc:azcmagent"`)
`earliest=-24h`
| eval rg_hint="Resources|where type=~'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'"
| eval hybrid_lc=lower(trim(coalesce(properties.status,status,arc_status,"")))
| eval machine_key=lower(trim(coalesce(name,Computer,properties_name,"")))
| eval rg_name=coalesce(resourceGroup,resource_group,rg,"")
| eval sub_id=coalesce(subscriptionId,"")
| eval last_raw=tostring(coalesce(properties_lastStatusChange,properties.lastStatusChange,lastStatusChange,""))
| eval last_epoch=coalesce(strptime(last_raw,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),strptime(last_raw,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3NZ"))
| eval sec_since=if(isnotnull(last_epoch),now()-last_epoch,null())
| eval ext_type=tostring(lower(trim(coalesce(extensionType,properties_type,""))))
| eval prov=lower(trim(coalesce(properties_provisioningState,provisioningState,"")))
| eval extension_family=case(match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.monitor\\.azuremonitor(windows|linux)agent"),"ama",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.enterprisecloud\\.monitoring\\.microsoftmonitoringagent"),"mma_legacy",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.guestconfiguration\\.guestconfiguration"),"guest_configuration",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.security\\.azuresecuritycenter"),"azure_security_center",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.security\\.antimalwareforpaas"),"antimalware_paas",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.management\\.dependencyagentwindows"),"dependency_agent_windows",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.compute\\.admincenter"),"admin_center_update_mgr",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.update\\.windowsadmincenter"),"windows_admin_center_portal",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.compute\\.customscriptextension"),"custom_script_extension",true(),"other")
| eval prov_enum=case(prov IN ("succeeded"),"Succeeded",prov IN ("failed"),"Failed",prov IN ("creating"),"Creating",prov IN ("deleting"),"Deleting",prov IN ("updating"),"Updating",true(),"Unknown")
| eval heartbeat_gap=case(hybrid_lc IN ("disconnected","error","expired"),1,match(lower(_raw),"(?i)(token|tls|cert|proxy|403|401|407)"),1,true(),0)
| eval extension_gap=case(prov_enum=="Failed",1,prov_enum IN ("Creating","Deleting","Updating"),1,true(),0)
| where heartbeat_gap=1 OR extension_gap=1
| stats latest(hybrid_lc) as hybrid_lc, latest(sec_since) as sec_since, values(prov_enum) as provisioning_states, values(extension_family) as extension_families, sum(eval(if(prov_enum=="Failed",1,0))) as failed_extensions, max(heartbeat_gap) as heartbeat_gap, latest(rg_hint) as rg_hint by machine_key, sub_id, rg_name
| eval guest_missing=if(isnull(mvfind(extension_families,"guest_configuration")),1,0)
| eval mma_without_ama=if(isnotnull(mvfind(extension_families,"mma_legacy")) AND isnull(mvfind(extension_families,"ama")),1,0)
| eval ordering_risk=guest_missing OR mma_without_ama OR failed_extensions>0 OR heartbeat_gap=1 OR isnotnull(mvfind(provisioning_states,"Failed"))
| where ordering_risk=1
| eval arm_lag_minutes=if(isnotnull(sec_since),round(sec_since/60,2),null())
| sort -heartbeat_gap -failed_extensions -arm_lag_minutes
| table machine_key, sub_id, rg_name, hybrid_lc, arm_lag_minutes, provisioning_states, extension_families, guest_missing, mma_without_ama, failed_extensions, rg_hint
```

**Field rationale:** **`rg_hint`** echoes **`Azure Resource Graph`** **`KQL`** against **`microsoft.hybridcompute/machines`**; **`extension_family`** maps **`properties.type`** strings; **`prov_enum`** preserves **`Succeeded`** / **`Failed`** / **`Creating`** / **`Deleting`** / **`Updating`** enums from REST payloads; **`heartbeat_gap`** raises **`Disconnected`** / **`Error`** / **`Expired`** posture plus **`himds`** TLS/token/proxy fingerprints; **`ordering_risk`** ORs **`guest_missing`**, **`mma_without_ama`**, **`failed_extensions`**, and **`heartbeat_gap`** before stats trims noisy rows.

**Post-SPL notes:** Version **`macros/arc_inventory_aliases`** in **`git`**; bundle **`azcmagent`** logs ZIP plus openssl captures per bridge ticket; align alert thresholds with roughly five-minute **`Connected` Machine Agent** heartbeat PUT cadence and roughly fifteen-minute disconnect behaviour documented on Learn; split macros into connection **`coalesce`** helpers versus extension **`rex`** helpers so TA upgrades produce smaller Git diffs.

Step 3 — **Validate against consoles and CLI**
(1) Compare Azure portal Arc Servers Status / Last status change columns against Splunk `hybrid_lc`, `arm_lag_minutes`, and `rg_hint` before opening Azure support cases—capture paired screenshots with UTC timestamps.
(2) `Get-AzConnectedMachine` plus `Get-AzConnectedMachineExtension`—paginate explicitly so `ProvisioningState` lists align with Splunk MV arrays.
(3) Run `azcmagent` `show` / `azcmagent` `logs` ZIP bundles during Sev2 reviews—versions must match `properties.agentVersion` when Resource Graph polls succeed.
(4) Paste `rg_hint` `KQL` into Resource Graph Explorer when Splunk subsets look thin—confirm subscription scopes cover every Arc resource group housing `microsoft.hybridcompute/machines` rows.

Step 4 — **Operationalise alerting**
(1) Schedule `savedsearch` `arc_hybrid_inventory_posture` daily with optional summary indexing when finance teams require immutable snapshots.
(2) Throttle fifteen minutes per `machine_key` unless `prov_enum` equals `Failed` twice inside five minutes—feed `lookup` `suppress_arc_noise` using CMDB `maintenance_window` UTC spans.
(3) Governance: stamp Splunk alert IDs onto ITSM tasks alongside explicit `microsoft.hybridcompute/machines` ARM identifiers.

Step 5 — **Troubleshooting patterns**
• `himds` TLS faults after proxy PKI rotations—reload corporate CA bundles into guest trust stores before widening firewall ACL exceptions toward `*.his.arc.azure.com`.
• HTTP **429** from `Azure Resource Graph` collectors—shard subscriptions per scheduled job, honor `Retry-After`, surface quota dashboards for Heavy Forwarder operators.
• Planned shutdown windows surface `Disconnected` rows—tie Splunk alerts to CMDB `offline_schedule` UTC ranges before paging hybrid crews.
• `GuestConfiguration` extensions stick `Updating` during policy remediation—compare Splunk provisioning MV arrays with Compliance blade narratives before paging policy owners.
• `mma_without_ama` fires during deliberate dual-pipe soak tests—mute rows when `migration_phase=parallel_ingest` lookup tags remain true post-August-2024 MMA hygiene waves.
• Duplicate `microsoft.hybridcompute/machines` registrations after VM clones—run `azcmagent` `disconnect` cleanup before Splunk duplicate-count logic escalates ghosts.
• `AccessTokenError` strings after chrony / `w32tm` skew—fix OS clock drift before escalating identity RCA bridges.
• Extension CDN download blocks versus healthy `his.arc.azure.com` reachability tests—split RCA between package delivery faults and Arc registration faults.
• Heavy Forwarder disk queues delaying `himds` tail reads—inspect `splunkd.log` `TailReader` warnings before declaring Arc outages.
• Splunk `host` NETBIOS aliases versus ARM FQDN mismatches—normalize via CMDB lookups before dedup logic hides real faults.
• `microsoft.azure.monitor.AzureMonitorWindowsAgent` `enableAutomaticUpgrade=false` during freeze windows—confirm Azure Automation accounts paused extension push jobs before Defender for Cloud tickets open.
• SELinux denials blocking `azcmagent` writes—compare `audit2allow` traces before blaming Arc portal disconnect narratives.
• Portal-green versus Splunk-red drift—correlate `Heartbeat` `Microsoft.HybridCompute` Log Analytics queries against noisy guest telemetry paths before paging hybrid crews.


## SPL

```spl
(`index=azure_arc` OR `index=azure_monitor` OR `index=mscs_cloud` OR `index=activity`)
(`sourcetype="azure:hybrid_compute_machines"` OR `sourcetype="mscs:resource:graph"` OR `sourcetype="azure:arc:extensions"` OR `sourcetype="azure:arc:himds"` OR `sourcetype="azure:arc:azcmagent"`)
`earliest=-24h`
| eval rg_hint="Resources|where type=~'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'"
| eval hybrid_lc=lower(trim(coalesce(properties.status,status,arc_status,"")))
| eval machine_key=lower(trim(coalesce(name,Computer,properties_name,"")))
| eval rg_name=coalesce(resourceGroup,resource_group,rg,"")
| eval sub_id=coalesce(subscriptionId,"")
| eval last_raw=tostring(coalesce(properties_lastStatusChange,properties.lastStatusChange,lastStatusChange,""))
| eval last_epoch=coalesce(strptime(last_raw,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),strptime(last_raw,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3NZ"))
| eval sec_since=if(isnotnull(last_epoch),now()-last_epoch,null())
| eval ext_type=tostring(lower(trim(coalesce(extensionType,properties_type,""))))
| eval prov=lower(trim(coalesce(properties_provisioningState,provisioningState,"")))
| eval extension_family=case(match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.monitor\\.azuremonitor(windows|linux)agent"),"ama",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.enterprisecloud\\.monitoring\\.microsoftmonitoringagent"),"mma_legacy",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.guestconfiguration\\.guestconfiguration"),"guest_configuration",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.security\\.azuresecuritycenter"),"azure_security_center",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.security\\.antimalwareforpaas"),"antimalware_paas",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.management\\.dependencyagentwindows"),"dependency_agent_windows",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.compute\\.admincenter"),"admin_center_update_mgr",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.azure\\.update\\.windowsadmincenter"),"windows_admin_center_portal",match(ext_type,"(?i)microsoft\\.compute\\.customscriptextension"),"custom_script_extension",true(),"other")
| eval prov_enum=case(prov IN ("succeeded"),"Succeeded",prov IN ("failed"),"Failed",prov IN ("creating"),"Creating",prov IN ("deleting"),"Deleting",prov IN ("updating"),"Updating",true(),"Unknown")
| eval heartbeat_gap=case(hybrid_lc IN ("disconnected","error","expired"),1,match(lower(_raw),"(?i)(token|tls|cert|proxy|403|401|407)"),1,true(),0)
| eval extension_gap=case(prov_enum=="Failed",1,prov_enum IN ("Creating","Deleting","Updating"),1,true(),0)
| where heartbeat_gap=1 OR extension_gap=1
| stats latest(hybrid_lc) as hybrid_lc, latest(sec_since) as sec_since, values(prov_enum) as provisioning_states, values(extension_family) as extension_families, sum(eval(if(prov_enum=="Failed",1,0))) as failed_extensions, max(heartbeat_gap) as heartbeat_gap, latest(rg_hint) as rg_hint by machine_key, sub_id, rg_name
| eval guest_missing=if(isnull(mvfind(extension_families,"guest_configuration")),1,0)
| eval mma_without_ama=if(isnotnull(mvfind(extension_families,"mma_legacy")) AND isnull(mvfind(extension_families,"ama")),1,0)
| eval ordering_risk=guest_missing OR mma_without_ama OR failed_extensions>0 OR heartbeat_gap=1 OR isnotnull(mvfind(provisioning_states,"Failed"))
| where ordering_risk=1
| eval arm_lag_minutes=if(isnotnull(sec_since),round(sec_since/60,2),null())
| sort -heartbeat_gap -failed_extensions -arm_lag_minutes
| table machine_key, sub_id, rg_name, hybrid_lc, arm_lag_minutes, provisioning_states, extension_families, guest_missing, mma_without_ama, failed_extensions, rg_hint
```

## Visualization

(1) Single-value tiles counting **`heartbeat_gap=1`** **`distinct`** **`machine_key`** **`by`** **`sub_id`** — compare against tenant Arc coverage targets.
(2) Heatmap **`extension_family`** **`presence`** **`by`** **`rg_name`** — spotlight unexpected **`mma_legacy`** clusters during AMA migration waves.
(3) Timeline overlay **`ordering_risk`** spikes with **`mscs:azure:eventhub`** **`Microsoft.HybridCompute`** **`writes`** when Activity streams exist.
(4) Table **`guest_missing`**, **`mma_without_ama`**, **`failed_extensions`**, **`arm_lag_minutes`** — route each column to named owners inside ticket templates.
(5) Dashboard Studio categorical chart mapping **`extension_family`** **`nodes`** **`into`** **`prov_enum`** **`outcomes`** for **`Failed`** hotspots.
